positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunrise, using a palette of deep navy blue, burnt orange, and soft lavender. The composition should feature clean, sharp lines and stacked triangular shapes, suggesting adventure and serenity. Ideal for a central apparel print with strong contrast against light fabric. Use vector art influence with a slight, ethereal gradient fill, maintaining perfect symmetry and high detail. Trending on ArtStation, crisp digital illustration, centered, symmetrical composition, bold contrast, high saturation, clean lines, print-ready, stylized nature motif.
